target_item: **穿透结论：** 公司试图通过定义“智能物业建筑”及堆砌 AI、机器人（机械狗）、WBS 平台等高科技词汇来提升估值，但底层逻辑是极低毛利的传统建筑承包业。
**致命漏洞：** 核心研发完全外包给北京公司 $\rightarrow$ 无自有专利 $\rightarrow$ 收入 99% 来自总承包服务 $\rightarrow$ 毛利率在 2024 年出现断崖式下跌（至 5.4%）。
**监管定性：** 涉嫌通过“概念包装”误导投资者，缺乏实质性的技术壁垒。
**穿透结论：** 公司并非独立的商业实体，而是一个为实控人（乔先生等）及其关联方提供服务的“内部作坊”。
**致命漏洞：** 收入高度集中于五大客户（部分期间占比近 100%） $\rightarrow$ 关联方交易定价公允性缺乏对标数据 $\rightarrow$ 往绩期间曾出现“零直接雇员”的极端情况。
**监管定性：** 缺乏商业独立性（Commercial Viability），一旦关联方停止下单，公司将立即陷入生存危机。
**穿透结论：** 财务报表存在明显的“美化”痕迹，通过非标准会计指标掩盖经营缺陷。
**致命漏洞：** 诡异的“经调整纯利”剔除财务担保亏损 $\rightarrow$ 巨额关联方非贸易往来款项（代付） $\rightarrow$ 2025 年突击启动第三方材料销售以补足营收。
**监管定性：** 涉嫌操纵利润（Earnings Management），内部控制严重失效（出现支票欺诈事件）。
**禁词：** 删除“首家”、“领先的”、“无可比拟”、“指数级增长”等绝对化词汇。
**修正：** 将“智能技术驱动” $\rightarrow$ 修改为“利用数字化工具提升效率的现代化建筑服务商”。
**指标：** 删除或弱化“经调整纯利（Adjusted Profit）”，回归 IFRS 标准。
**披露：** 将“报销开支”按 $\text{Agent}$（代理人）模式进行净额法核算对比，防止营收虚增。
**担保：** 建立 $\text{担保方} \rightarrow \text{被担保方} \rightarrow \text{抵押物} \rightarrow \text{到期日}$ 的明细表。
**人员：** 详细披露从 Wan Bridge Group 转移员工的法律路径，消除“零雇员”的历史污点。
**合规：** 在特拉华州法摘要中增加 $\text{Overriding Commitment}$，承诺在冲突时优先遵守香港上市规则。
**地缘政治：** 将简单的“关税增加”升级为“中美供应链脱钩下的替代方案（Alternative Sourcing Plan）”。
**技术风险：** 增加“外包研发导致的技术响应迟缓”及“缺乏专利保护导致的低门槛竞争”风险。
**查询指令**: `股份`
**检索时间**: 2026年 4月15日 星期三 11时33分44秒 CST
**M4 Max 算力状态**: 语义坐标匹配完成

**实施延迟**：功能从期望的 4 月 3 日推迟到 4 月 11 日，延迟约 8 天
**管控强度**：IT 部门建议不完全强制执行"无合同不创建账目"，避免对业务造成过大影响
✅ **无需额外回复** — 邮件线程已在 Hazel 的确认中自然结束

City/county review is typically where I have seen project delays, because the review time is ultimately up to each individual entity. This will allow us to keep track of each separate submittal through the life of the project and update the schedule based on review times.

33 days for section 1 bidding feels fast. The 3rd parties you anticipate bidding on the job, have you worked with them before? Do you feel confident in their pricing and their ability to bid accurately in 2 weeks?

I submitted a case to Yardi to schedule the ETL exports for FinCharges, FinJournals, & FinReceipts to export 1 historical data dump, then schedule the data to export each hour

I submitted another case to Yardi to setup a Custom ETL for FinPayables since the export has a bug. Once the Custom ETL is setup, Yardi will export 1 historical data dump, then schedule the data to export each hour

Next steps: @ting Qiao <mailto:tingq@wanbridgegroup.com>  I'm not sure of the scope of work we agreed upon with Polestar - can you provide context here?
Option 1: FinPayables ETL export
Problem: Has a bug that causes the detail lines to show as totals. Yardi has no timeline if or when this will be fixed since it is a deep coding issue.
Option 2: Export to CSV for Payables
Problem: Missing headers on export & can only export up to 1MB at a time *see attached example.

I have a solution for the missing headers that I received after we engaged the 3rd party. This would be a time consuming task due to the export size limit, but can be done. This option would be best if we only need the data once for initial comparison - definitely not feasible long term.
Option 3: Custom ETL export with SFTP Server & stored procedure
This option we have not explored yet. I would need an SFTP server path for this. If we need the Payable data to be exported to WBS on a recurring basis, this is a good long term solution.

target_item: Change of plat submittal date based on submittal deadlines at the City of Houston
Separated the City review for public and private plans

City/county review is typically where I have seen project delays, because the review time is ultimately up to each individual entity. This will allow us to keep track of each separate submittal through the life of the project and update the schedule based on review times.
The $600k project management costs – is that the same thing as the Lot Development Fee ($5,555 per lot) per our agreement or separate?
The amenity package, that’s for design, right?

The engineer’s probable construction costs of $3.6M at $24k/unit feels light. After your review of the proposal and required work per the conceptual plans, do you feel confident in the number? Or should we add on additional contingency (I know they added 20%)?
Is the prelim plat ready? Noticed there’s only 1 day allotted.
Is the typical turn around time 2 weeks for COH?

33 days for section 1 bidding feels fast. The 3rd parties you anticipate bidding on the job, have you worked with them before? Do you feel confident in their pricing and their ability to bid accurately in 2 weeks?

Left turn lane bidding says its 58 days vs. the 33 days for section 1 bidding; however, the duration for each task is the same. I noticed you’re projecting to prepare the contract docs on 10/30/24 but do not advertise until 12/4/24. Is that correct or are you advertising for bids the whole time?
Just a comment, we love starting vertical in September for leasing in the spring market!

target_item: Change of plat submittal date based on submittal deadlines at the City of Houston
Separated the City review for public and private plans

City/county review is typically where I have seen project delays, because the review time is ultimately up to each individual entity. This will allow us to keep track of each separate submittal through the life of the project and update the schedule based on review times.
The $600k project management costs – is that the same thing as the Lot Development Fee ($5,555 per lot) per our agreement or separate?
The amenity package, that’s for design, right?

The engineer’s probable construction costs of $3.6M at $24k/unit feels light. After your review of the proposal and required work per the conceptual plans, do you feel confident in the number? Or should we add on additional contingency (I know they added 20%)?
Is the prelim plat ready? Noticed there’s only 1 day allotted.
Is the typical turn around time 2 weeks for COH?

33 days for section 1 bidding feels fast. The 3rd parties you anticipate bidding on the job, have you worked with them before? Do you feel confident in their pricing and their ability to bid accurately in 2 weeks?

Left turn lane bidding says its 58 days vs. the 33 days for section 1 bidding; however, the duration for each task is the same. I noticed you’re projecting to prepare the contract docs on 10/30/24 but do not advertise until 12/4/24. Is that correct or are you advertising for bids the whole time?
Just a comment, we love starting vertical in September for leasing in the spring market!
Date shipped  >> 3/1/2024

target_item: Vendor vs Payee data needed and defaults.  What are all the vendor categories? Can we have supplier, payee, and vendor category access? Payee should not look like the vendor set-up if it will never require reporting information.
Auto-populate from last invoice option?
M=multiple option on payables containing more than one invoice entry within or a way to differentiate when payables contain more than one invoice number?
Recurring invoice option?
Access to reverse/void check numbers and payables?
For multiple line item invoices the ability to populate the same code in the multiple invoice lines.
How to get the addresses in WBS to override the addresses in FAST?
Auto generate next line once one line is completed.
Can the project or dept filters be sorted into Houston Dallas and Austin drop tabs?

Why does FAST require manual invoicing? Why does the spreadsheet sent not upload to that system? Check info importing needs FAST info to match 100% but we export multiple line items on one invoice and it’s paid via multiple checks in FAST so the info never ties in.
Populate from last invoice option?
Influx of invalid status on contract invoices, why? It seems to have begun after we removed Bell & Associates for fraud.

Vendors that show in imported reports from FAST but do not show in the vendor list.  (Monday Board I have a couple of vendors on the FAST journal report that do not show up in the vendor list. How does this happen? Green Valley Lawn, US-EcoLogic 04/24 JS)
Platform cue doesn’t show invoice numbers and it should.
Accounting workflow, either vendor specific or a drop/check option on invoices entered by accounting members to send them to accounting for approval only and then to Danting and TIng.
FAST invoices importing into invoice registry and viewable w/attachments?
List showing all properties, all codes etc. to ensure the right people have the right access.
Vendor rating stars exporting to future checks?

We need different payment options other than 'paid' or processing a check on contract invoices. 05/01 JS
Can 'rollback' invoices show in a separate box from the created and pending approval invoices? 05/03 JS
Can we add one invoice registry page to be able to view all invoices, both contract and reimbursement, and invoices imported from FAST for vendors? 05/03 JS

All PC Insiders™ World Elite Mastercard ® cardholders earn the regular earning rate of 50 points per litre at Esso™ and Mobil™ stations in Canada, which includes: the standard 10 points per dollar for all qualifying purchases with the PC Financial ® Mastercard ® , the 30 PC Optimum™ points per litre of gasoline or diesel fuel when you pay with your PC Insiders™ World Elite Mastercard ® , and the 10 PC Optimum™ points per litre available to all PC Optimum™ loyalty members. Should fuel prices fall below $1/L, causing total points per litre awarded to fall below 50 points per litre, points will be topped up to ensure a minimum of 50 points per litre are awarded. In addition to the regular earning rate of at least 50 points per litre, PC Insiders™ World Elite Mastercard ® cardholders can also earn 20 bonus points per litre – for a total of 70 points per litre – by purchasing at least 150 litres of fuel at Esso™ and Mobil™ stations in a calendar month. The additional 20 points per litre will apply to all fuel purchases made at Esso™ and Mobil™ stations in the same calendar month in which the 150-litre threshold was achieved. Earn an additional 10 points per litre of premium gasoline (Octane 89, 91, 93, 94) at Esso™ and select Mobil™ Stations. You could earn even more points at Mobil™ stations located adjacent to a Loblaw banner grocery store. Exact earn rate is available at the station. For full details including how points are awarded to your PC Optimum™ account and rounding rules, visit pcfinancial.ca/en/legal-stuff/pc-optimum-mastercard/.

target_item: Vendor vs Payee data needed and defaults.  What are all the vendor categories? Can we have supplier, payee, and vendor category access? Payee should not look like the vendor set-up if it will never require reporting information.
Auto-populate from last invoice option?
M=multiple option on payables containing more than one invoice entry within or a way to differentiate when payables contain more than one invoice number?
Recurring invoice option?
Access to reverse/void check numbers and payables?
For multiple line item invoices the ability to populate the same code in the multiple invoice lines.
How to get the addresses in WBS to override the addresses in FAST?
Auto generate next line once one line is completed.
Can the project or dept filters be sorted into Houston Dallas and Austin drop tabs?

Why does FAST require manual invoicing? Why does the spreadsheet sent not upload to that system? Check info importing needs FAST info to match 100% but we export multiple line items on one invoice and it’s paid via multiple checks in FAST so the info never ties in.
Populate from last invoice option?
Influx of invalid status on contract invoices, why? It seems to have begun after we removed Bell & Associates for fraud.

Vendors that show in imported reports from FAST but do not show in the vendor list.  (Monday Board I have a couple of vendors on the FAST journal report that do not show up in the vendor list. How does this happen? Green Valley Lawn, US-EcoLogic 04/24 JS)
Platform cue doesn’t show invoice numbers and it should.
Accounting workflow, either vendor specific or a drop/check option on invoices entered by accounting members to send them to accounting for approval only and then to Danting and TIng.
FAST invoices importing into invoice registry and viewable w/attachments?
List showing all properties, all codes etc. to ensure the right people have the right access.
Vendor rating stars exporting to future checks?
Fastest way to upload missing check information and to journal discrepancies. Do we have a process?

Invoice numbers should be 'vendor specific' and not submission type specific. 05/03 JS If 1234 is used on a contract invoice for Wilson it should not be allowed to be entered as an invoice number for a reimbursement invoice for Wilson
Will the defaulted payment preference vendors submit automatically carry over to their invoices when entered?
Can the payee information slots (when researching invoices) 'mirror' the vendor list slot with the scrollable drop down that is auto-populated with all of the vendors in WBS? 04/26 JS
How can I deactivate or hide vendors that are not complete and that we do not have the W-9/info for?
Can 'opinions' on contract invoices be changed to 'comments' like it is on reimbursement invoices? It might make it easier for people to find the comments when reviewing rejected invoices.
When an invoice is rejected and a comment is made can the comment tab populate to red to flag the user?
Can the check date be imported when the check number is? It will make researching outstanding payments more time efficient.
Can the updated information (forward to process, check cut, etc.) be added as timestamped information in the 'comment' section that shows the invoice history from start to final approval?

There needs to be a way to void payments in WBS so that the invoice everts to approved and not paid. Without this feature it will remain very hard to keep up with payments that need to be reissued.  04/21 JS When a check payment is voided and reissued with a new check number, how is that tracked in WBS? Is there a feature that will allow us to void the payment in WBS o that the new check information can import? 04/18 JS
We need different payment options other than 'paid' or processing a check on contract invoices. 05/01 JS
Can 'rollback' invoices show in a separate box from the created and pending approval invoices? 05/03 JS
Can we add one invoice registry page to be able to view all invoices, both contract and reimbursement, and invoices imported from FAST for vendors? 05/03 JS

Ricky will invalidate the duplicated entries in WBS on the 20th day of each month.

target_item: On the 10th day of each month, Michelle will complete the draw invoice and bookings of Yardi.
On the 13th day of each month, Michelle will send Ricky a list of items to be manually entered in WBS for reconciliation with Yardi.
Ricky should finish entering the manual items by the 15th day of each month.
Michelle will double-check whether any manual entries in WBS should be dropped and send the dropping list (if any) on the 18th day of each month.
Ricky will invalidate the duplicated entries in WBS on the 20th day of each month.

To qualify for the HSBC Mortgage Rewards offer, you must purchase a new property and are taking a new personal mortgage loan with HSBC or move your existing Mortgage to HSBC with a five-year fixed or five-variable closed term. The mortgage application must be started during the Offer Period and fully funded by HSBC within 120 days of the application start date and no later than September 30, 2023. You must have an open and active HSBC World Elite® or HSBC Premier World Elite Mastercard® by the mortgage funding date. If you do not meet the terms and conditions of the offer, you will not be able to participate in the HSBC Mortgage Rewards offer.

Payee – If the utility was paid with the Regions CC, then the payee should be Regions Bank not the Utility company to be able to reconcile the due to the Vendor which is Regions Bank.
Account/Description – The due to/from Cost code should be TBD Management. Per below the due to/from is WPRED. Which means the cost code is incorrect, or the transactions should be in WPRED.
Class – Payments made with the TBD CC Regions Bank are related to TBD Properties only. So, the class should be a TBD Property ID for example: TXHOUPRA, TXHOULAG, TXDARAY1…
